title: KPMG India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: KPMG India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
KPMG India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Rajkot. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About KPMG India:
KPMG India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPMG India!
